enterpriseBand.heading: State Associations & Multi-League Networks

enterpriseBand.label: Talk to Sales ->

items.question: Do I need a credit card to get started?
items.answer: No. We start with a demo and scoping call to make sure ScheduleRama is the right fit for your program. There's no self-serve signup — we set you up directly.

items.question: What counts as a "school" or "league"?
items.answer: A school is any organization with its own teams and schedule. A league is a grouping of schools that share game scheduling and coordination. We'll help you map your program to the right plan during onboarding.

items.question: Can I switch plans mid-season?
items.answer: Yes. You can upgrade at any time and the change takes effect immediately. Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle. Your data is never affected by a plan change.

items.question: Is there a discount for annual billing?
items.answer: Yes — annual plans save 20% compared to monthly billing. Toggle between billing periods above to see the difference.

items.question: What kind of support is included?
items.answer: All plans include email support and access to our user guide and documentation. Pro and League plans include priority support with faster response times. Enterprise customers get a dedicated account manager.

items.question: How does data import work?
items.answer: Pro and League plans include our validated schedule import tool. You map your CSV columns to our fields, we validate the data, and games populate directly into your schedule. No manual re-entry required.

title: Pricing

hero.heading:
Simple,
Transparent Pricing
hero.summary: One platform for every role in your athletic program. No per-seat surprises. No hidden add-ons.

description: Simple, transparent pricing for every athletic program. No per-seat surprises. Pricing based on your school's size because we want to make sure we don't leave anyone behind.
